current_seasonal_note: Q2 2026: Oil seasonally strong (driving season demand builds May-Sep). BTC halving cycle 12-18mo post-halving historically bullish (May 2024 halving → peak window Q4 2025-Q2 2026). Tax season April = selling pressure then done.

events.name: Good Friday
events.notes: Traditional markets closed. Crypto trades normally but thin. European holiday.

events.name: Easter Monday
events.notes: European + Australian markets closed. Crypto thin. Coincides with Trump deadline.

events.name: US Tax deadline
events.notes: Tax-related selling typically peaks 1-2 weeks before. BTC often bottoms around tax day.

events.name: US Memorial Day
events.notes: Unofficial start of driving season. Oil demand picks up. Long weekend = thin crypto.

events.name: OPEC+ mid-year review
events.notes: Mid-year production quota review. Any signal of output increase is bearish.

events.name: US Independence Day
events.notes: US markets closed. Thin trading all week around it.

oil.jan_feb: Refinery maintenance season, lower demand. Contango can build.
oil.mar_may: Refinery restarts, gasoline blend switch. Demand building to summer.
oil.jun_aug: Peak driving season demand. Hurricane season Gulf of Mexico risk.
oil.sep_nov: Driving season ends. Refinery maintenance 2. Often weakest period.
oil.dec: Year-end positioning. Tax-loss selling. Typically thin.

btc.jan: New year inflows. Often strong start.
btc.may_jun: Sell in May? Not in halving year cycles. Often continues.
btc.oct_nov: Historically strongest months. Q4 rally setup.
btc.dec: Year-end positioning. Can be strong or profit-taking.
